description: APIHubDeployment is the Schema for the APIHubDeployment API

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to. Cannot be updated. In CamelCase. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: APIHubDeploymentSpec defines the desired state of APIHubDeployment

deploymentTypeRef.description: Required. The type of deployment. This maps to the following system defined attribute: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/attributes/system-deployment-type` attribute. The number of values for this attribute will be based on the cardinality of the attribute. The same can be retrieved via GetAttribute API. All values should be from the list of allowed values defined for the attribute.

external.description: The `id` of an allowed value of an attribute, when not managed by Config Connector.

description.description: Optional. The description of the deployment.

displayName.description: Required. The display name of the deployment.

documentation.description: Optional. The documentation of the deployment.

externalURI.description: Optional. The uri of the externally hosted documentation.

endpoints.description: Required. The endpoints at which this deployment resource is listening for API requests. This could be a list of complete URIs, hostnames or an IP addresses.

environmentRef.description: Optional. The environment mapping to this deployment. This maps to the following system defined attribute: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/attributes/system-environment` attribute. The number of values for this attribute will be based on the cardinality of the attribute. The same can be retrieved via GetAttribute API. All values should be from the list of allowed values defined for the attribute.

external.description: The `id` of an allowed value of an attribute, when not managed by Config Connector.

projectRef.description: The project that this resource belongs to.

external.description: The `projectID` field of a project, when not managed by Config Connector.

kind.description: The kind of the Project resource; optional but must be `Project` if provided.

resourceID.description: The APIHubDeployment name. If not given, the metadata.name will be used.

resourceURI.description: Required. A URI to the runtime resource. This URI can be used to manage the resource. For example, if the runtime resource is of type APIGEE_PROXY, then this field will contain the URI to the management UI of the proxy.

sloRef.description: Optional. The SLO for this deployment. This maps to the following system defined attribute: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/attributes/system-slo` attribute. The number of values for this attribute will be based on the cardinality of the attribute. The same can be retrieved via GetAttribute API. All values should be from the list of allowed values defined for the attribute.

external.description: The `id` of an allowed value of an attribute, when not managed by Config Connector.

status.description: APIHubDeploymentStatus defines the config connector machine state of APIHubDeployment

conditions.description: Conditions represent the latest available observations of the object's current state.

lastTransitionTime.description: Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about last transition.

reason.description: Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

status.description: Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.

type.description: Type is the type of the condition.

externalRef.description: A unique specifier for the APIHubDeployment resource in GCP.

observedGeneration.description: ObservedGeneration is the generation of the resource that was most recently observed by the Config Connector controller. If this is equal to metadata.generation, then that means that the current reported status reflects the most recent desired state of the resource.

observedState.description: ObservedState is the state of the resource as most recently observed in GCP.

apiVersions.description: Output only. The API versions linked to this deployment. Note: A particular deployment could be linked to multiple different API versions (of same or different APIs).

createTime.description: Output only. The time at which the deployment was created.

updateTime.description: Output only. The time at which the deployment was last updated.
